title: Automatic wearable powered air purifying system and method
abstract: An automatic portable air purifying system. It consists of a battery operated air source, an air purifying filter (114), a respiratory apparatus (116) for user and a respirator controller which can detect user's breath pattern and automatically adjust the purified flow to meet user breathing needs and improve the breathing comfort.
